Selected projects

Hover to pause

How we transform your space

Discovery

We begin with an in-home consultation to understand your space in detail, from layout and proportions to natural light, materials, and existing architecture. This allows us to fully assess both the potential and the constraints, while grounding the design in what makes your home uniquely yours.

Curation

Next comes the edit. We thoughtfully combine pieces you already love with carefully sourced vintage finds, new furnishings, textiles, artwork, and objects. Every element is selected with intention, aligned to your aesthetic, lifestyle, and budget.

Installation

Finally, we bring everything together with a fully realized installation. The result is a space that feels elevated yet lived-in, never staged, never overdone. A home that reflects who you are today, while evolving effortlessly with you over time.

Ariel
Hartzy

Founder and lead stylist, Hartzy Haus

"Whether you leave it every morning or never leave at all, your home should be your favorite place in the world."

Every home is inherently unique. My role is to uncover the connection between its existing architecture and your personal style, translating that into a space that feels both cohesive and deeply yours.


Without demolition or renovation, we layer soul into every corner, shelf, and surface through thoughtful sourcing and intentional styling, creating a home you can fall in love with again.

Let's work
together.

Tell me about your space and what you're feeling. I'll be in touch within 48 hours.
